evidence.snippet: Desert Rotor – Commercial and Military Ground Control Stations For Unmanned Systems

At Desert Rotor, we design innovative, customizable ground control systems built for the unique needs of unmanned operators worldwide. With scalable solutions, U.S.-based support, and a client-focused approach, we partner with you to bring your unmanned operations to the next level. Discover how our expertise and technology empower your mission.

items.notes: Core business is Ground Control Stations (MIRA X, COMMAND XD, FENNEC XS) for unmanned systems across air, land, and sea.
Sells Communication Links and Antenna Systems as distinct product lines.
Sells Li-Ion battery packs and modular BKPK power systems for GCS field use.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures GCS platforms (a major drone subsystem), plus communication links, antennas, and power systems for unmanned operators.

evidence.snippet: Our flagship model, MIRA X balances high performance with maximum portability. The most powerful and portable GCS on the market.

All new Ground Control Station Form Factor
– Designed to be mounted inside unmanned vans, trucks, and command centers! –

items.notes: Listed as under development; production version design not yet final.

items.name: GCS PanoView
items.product_type: panoramic display expansion for MIRA X GCS

evidence.snippet:
###### GCS PanoView
Unlock new levels of workable screen space with GCS PanoView, an immersive option for the MIRA X GCS. Offering a panoramic view of your mission data, PanoView enhances situational awareness and control for any operation. Learn more about how it elevates the MIRA X experience.

###### GCS Field Stand
Take your ground control operations anywhere with the GCS Field Stand, designed to provide a stable and portable solution for outdoor missions. Built for rugged environments, this durable stand enhances your MIRA X GCS setup on the go. Click to see how it supports your mission, wherever it takes you.![](https://desertrotor.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/DSC_2178-copy-w_-bg.png)

ndaa.notes: Site explicitly claims 'NDAA Compliant' on homepage and 'NDAA & Section 8 compliant' on client spotlight page. Specific section number is partially stated; DoD approved with CAGE Code 8TAT7.

evidence.snippet: **Reseller, Dealer, and Quantity Rates Available, Contact Us For More Details**
Our flagship model, MIRA X balances high performance with maximum portability. The most powerful and portable GCS on the market.

readiness.notes: MIRA X and COMMAND XD are available catalog products with a quote configurator, reseller/dealer rates, and listed SKUs. FENNEC XS is separately flagged as in development.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 specificity — site says 'NDAA Compliant' and 'NDAA & Section 8 compliant' but does not spell out Section 848 or 889 explicitly.
Blue UAS cleared list status not mentioned anywhere in corpus.
About-Us page was not fetched — may contain additional company history and capability details.

fetch_requests.reason: About page would confirm company founding, full product scope, and any additional compliance certifications (NDAA specifics, export controls).
fetch_requests.source_hint: guessed standard /about-us/ path; linked from homepage nav

tagline: Manufactures portable and rackmount HOTAS ground control stations (MIRA X, COMMAND XD) plus power systems and field accessories for unmanned operations. NDAA-compliant, USA-made. Limited public evidence on specific platform integrations or operational deployments; Blue UAS certification status unknown.
